title: Communauté d'agglomération Tarbes-Lourdes-Pyrénées
summary: The Communauté d'agglomération Tarbes-Lourdes-Pyrénées is an intercommunal structure in the Hautes-Pyrénées department, in the Occitanie region of southern France. It was created in January 2017. Its seat is in Juillan. Its area is 614.8 km2. Its population was 123,588 in 2017, of which 41,518 in Tarbes proper.
text:
The Communauté d'agglomération Tarbes-Lourdes-Pyrénées is an intercommunal structure in the Hautes-Pyrénées department, in the Occitanie region of southern France. It was created in January 2017. Its seat is in Juillan. Its area is 614.8 km2. Its population was 123,588 in 2017, of which 41,518 in Tarbes proper.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 86 communes:
